title: Decocrafting!
description: A modpack with a few decoration and optimazation mods!
body:
**_ Just a Modpack with a few simple decoration mods!_** Do wacky machinery with **_create_** or cook something with **_Farmer's Delight_**! Decorate every single corner of your house or do a shelter with survival items/block! **The only limit is your _imagination!_** **Perfect for old computers!**
